holdings.infoBox: BUZZ is an equity ETF with a total of 76 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 4.12%, Advanced Micro Devices at 3.57%, Nebius Group at 3.45%, Intel at 3.24%, and ServiceNow at 3.21%.

overview.description: The VanEck Social Sentiment ETF (BUZZ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund holds 75 US-listed firms with the most positive investor sentiment online. The fund uses a proprietary AI model to select and weight stocks. BUZZ was launched on Mar 2, 2021 and is issued by VanEck.
infoTable: BUZZ NextGen AI US Sentiment Leaders Index
